children.name: RBAC: Administration is hidden for Stand
children.characters: RBAC: Administration is hidden for Standard Users (server also rejects with 403).

children.name: Media library (Asset Service, Catalogize
children.characters: Media library (Asset Service, Catalogizer-backed) · links resolve through the Asset Service, never raw paths [§7.1]

children.name: Re-download repairs broken physical link
children.characters: Re-download repairs broken physical links via REST; streaming uses Range/

children.name: + HLS/DASH; sensitive assets are encrypt
children.characters: + HLS/DASH; sensitive assets are encrypted (credit-cards / contracts / QR) [§7].

children.name: No assets yet — they appear as posts are
children.characters: No assets yet — they appear as posts are processed.

children.name: Links to Channels to add a source.
children.characters: Links to Channels to add a source.

children.name: Re-download action restores the file via
children.characters: Re-download action restores the file via REST; tile badge until repaired.

children.name: Requires an unlock step; preview disable
children.characters: Requires an unlock step; preview disabled while locked [§7].

children.name: Range/OpenSeekable + HLS/DASH; player is
children.characters: Range/OpenSeekable + HLS/DASH; player is the media-viewer composite.

children.characters: Helix Development attribution is locked — it persists under any white-label.
